sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84166" key="podomerh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποδο-μερής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στίχοι ποδομερεῖς,</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n84166.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">versus partipedes (qui in singulis pedibus singulas orationis partes adsignant</tr_>), Diom.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.498K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
